title: Hiding projects or boards from selected users and guests?
excerpt: New user here. Can I hide projects or boards from selected users? I’d like to make desired projects or boards visible only to selected users and completely invisible to others. Is this possible with the Standard version? …

posts.author: KSellars (Keith S)
posts.cookedHtml: New user here. Can I hide projects or boards from selected users? I’d like to make desired projects or boards visible only to selected users and completely invisible to others. Is this possible with the Standard version?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @KSellars - on the standard plan you can set boards as Shareable. This will only allow members and guests that are directly subscribed to the board to see it.

You can learn more about board types here:
The difference between board types – Support (monday.com)

Thanks,
Mark
